description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript's native Date class, testing practical API usage, formatting, and localization without relying on external libraries. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, presented in an engaging, informal tone that encourages self‑assessment. The questions aim to deepen understanding of Date's quirks and proper handling.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Date parsing and formatting, Time zones and localization, Common pitfalls and best practices
Audience: Front‑end developers and JavaScript programmers with basic experience who want to solidify their native Date handling skills.
